title: ledger.jsonl entry
description: Schema for one line in .orchestration/ledger.jsonl as written by self_eval.sh cmd_record. Extended over the antigravity original with skill/tier/executor/drift_check/taste_checkpoint fields.

skill.description: Skill name from --skill flag. null for legacy runs.

phases_run.description: Phase names executed in this run. null when not recorded (pre-T6 runs or single-phase without --phases).

claimed.description: 1 if executor claimed STATUS: COMPLETE; 0 if it did not; null if not assessable.

honest.description: true if claim matched git reality; false if dishonest; null if not assessable.

lines.description: Number of real changed files per git truth.

drift_check.description: Cross-phase consistency check. PASS = no file touched by prev phase reappeared unclaimed in this phase. SKIPPED = no --prev-digest provided (single-phase run).

taste_checkpoint.description: Visual regression check. PASS = screenshot diff <= 10%. SKIPPED = screenshots not provided or ImageMagick absent.
